title: Monster Booklet
description: Adds 6 hostile mobs to the game
body:
## YIPPER
BUMBLING BUFFOON. Heals other hostile monsters and flees from you. Can be used as a stepping stool. Spawns in deserts.
![Yipper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23699da3259c73450c5a8f4baec8978932001cd5_0.webp)

## SNIPPER
3 HEADED BUFFOON. Goes after you and explodes into a pile of snow and enemies that were buried in it. Spawns in cold biomes.
![Loads o' snippers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca6c5fcc7be8223b87b16d2cbde553c1d2d1e6fd_0.webp)

## BUCKETHEAD
UNDEAD BUFFOON. Works like a regular zombie. Can rush at you in cardinal directions. Spawns in overworld.
![Buckethead going in for the hit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4957e9a88b024bae9b0c699db612484c96174ad.png)

## INFERNO
BURNING BUFFOON. Shoots Giant bouncy flame projectiles at you. Spawns in nether fortresses.
![Inferno itself](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef2eb0ac2ba9647bce79a2a5b9d438366682657c_0.webp)
![Inferno's projectile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba66caa652387dcf2cb1149f315217684c8f95c4_0.webp)

## FIEND
HENCHMAN BUFFOON. Throws rock and bombs at you. Spawns in overworld caves below 20 y.
![Moments before exploding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce87541d6398d7d3345eca17512eeb5c33412e21.png)

## GLOW MOSQO
GLOWING BUFFOON. Spawns in lush caves. Is usually neutral, if you accidentally hit it, all of them start trying to impale you.
![The sillies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cca41bf5023975093b73c6581120fb89a49c3801_0.webp)
## BLACK MOLD
HARMLESS BUFFOON. Explodes into spores upon being disturbed. This can convert grass and dirt into black mold, the block.(![Ow my lungs. OW. The fuzzy black mold and the block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/decd0458bc122e5fa7d60a60784cb45c79831fc8.png)
### Eventually all critters will recieve custom drops. However, that time isn't now.
